description: CreateConnectorProfileRequest schema from Amazon AppFlow API

connectorProfileName.description: The name of the connector profile. The name is unique for each ConnectorProfile in your AWS account.

connectorType.description: The type of connector, such as Salesforce, Marketo, and so on.

connectorLabel.description: The label of the connector. The label is unique for each ConnectorRegistration in your AWS account.

connectionMode.description: Indicates the connection mode and specifies whether it is public or private.

kmsArn.description: The ARN of the KMS key to use to encrypt your connector profile credentials.

connectorProfileConfig.description: Defines the connector-specific configuration and credentials.
